text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the race, Tokai Teio lets out a deep sigh.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! I'm starving over here!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I want snow carrot steak with organic carrot juice, and I want it now!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What! Nooo! But I'm so huuungry! Come ooon!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I worked so hard! Give me compliments!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio is acting bratty. It's probably the exhaustion
catching up to her. I should reconsider her race
schedule in the meantime.
